data.title: Add cross-links from skill/agent instruction files to stage-boundary-preconditions schema + runbook
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Context
Add cross-links (one line of reference each) to the 7 skill/agent instruction files listed in the story's done definitions. Each link points to docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/ so practitioners using those skills can find the schema reference and ops runbook. This task makes T3's RED cross-link test turn GREEN.

No behavior change — these are documentation cross-links only.

## TDD Requirement
No new test written (GREEN task — implements to make T3's RED tests pass). Exemption citation: Unit exemption criterion 3 — this task modifies only LLM instruction files (SKILL.md, agent .md files) and shell script headers (non-executable wiring), where per Rule 5 and TDD reviewer instruction-file scoring guidance, structural boundary tests are the correct testing approach. T3 provides that structural boundary coverage.

## Files to Modify

### Cross-link format
Add a single reference line in an appropriate "See Also" or "Related" section at the bottom of each file. Example format:
```
> Stage-boundary preconditions reference: [Schema Reference](../../../docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/schema-reference.md) | [Ops Runbook](../../../docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/ops-runbook.md) | [Pinned Contracts](../../../docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/pinned-contracts.md)
```
Adjust relative path depth per file location. The reference just needs to contain the literal string "stage-boundary-preconditions".

### Files to update (7 total)

1. **plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md** — Add cross-link block at end of file before any trailing newlines
2. **plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md** — Add cross-link block at end of file
3. **plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md** — Add cross-link block at end of file
4. **plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md** — Add cross-link block at end of file
5. **plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md** — Add cross-link block at end of file
6. **plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh** — Add comment block near header (after the file header comment block): `# Stage-boundary preconditions reference: docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/`
7. **plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh** — Add comment block near header (after the file header comment block): `# Stage-boundary preconditions reference: docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/`

### IMPORTANT: Plugin path policy
Do NOT use `plugins/dso/` as a hardcoded literal path in any script file being modified. The cross-link in shell script headers is a comment, not an import — this is an exemption from the plugin-self-ref check (it's a comment, not a path used in code). If the check-plugin-self-ref.sh hook objects, wrap with `# portability-ok` annotation.

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` | Edit (add cross-link) |
| `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` | Edit (add cross-link) |
| `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md` | Edit (add cross-link) |
| `plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md` | Edit (add cross-link) |
| `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md` | Edit (add cross-link) |
| `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh` | Edit (add comment) |
| `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh` | Edit (add comment) |

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] preplanning SKILL.md contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] sprint SKILL.md contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] implementation-plan SKILL.md contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] completion-verifier.md contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] harvest-worktree.sh contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] merge-to-main.sh contains reference to stage-boundary-preconditions
  Verify: grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] Cross-link verification test (T3) passes after this task
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh
